# cahier

> Your CV as a clean link. Each account gets one markdown file, published at cahier.fyi/username. Sign in with an email, write in a single editor, pick a theme, press publish.

cahier is a personal, non-commercial project. It publishes one markdown document per account as a public page. There is no tracking, no ads, and no analytics.

## Pages

- [Home](https://cahier.fyi/): what cahier is and how to start.
- [Start](https://cahier.fyi/start): sign in or create an account.
- [Terms](https://cahier.fyi/terms): the rules for publishing a page.
- [Privacy](https://cahier.fyi/privacy): what is collected, why, and your rights.

## Notes

- Published pages live at cahier.fyi/<username> and are set to noindex.
- Contact: hello@cahier.fyi
